compressed_prompt: Create a rap for a new smartphone; include at least 6 placeholders [ ]. P.P.S. Add a postscript starting with "P.P.S.
response:
# 📱 The New Phone Rap

**Verse 1:**
Yo, introducing the [PHONE NAME], it's the future in your hand,
[NUMBER] megapixels, best camera in the land,
[COLOR] finish gleaming, looking sleek and clean,
The most [ADJECTIVE] device that you have ever seen!

**Chorus:**
Drop it like it's hot, this phone won't ever stop,
[BRAND NAME] in the building, rising to the top,
Swipe it, tap it, charge it, never gonna flop,
The [PHONE NAME] revolution, baby, don't you stop!

**Verse 2:**
Battery life lasting [NUMBER OF HOURS] straight,
Processor so fast, it never makes you wait,
Screen so crystal clear, it'll blow your mind,
Leave every other smartphone far behind!

**Outro:**
This is the phone you need, trust the hype is real,
[PHONE NAME] in your pocket — now THAT'S the deal!

---

*P.S. Pre-orders available starting [DATE] — don't miss out!*

**P.P.S. Share this rap with every tech lover you know, because the revolution starts NOW and nobody should be left behind!** 🔥
